'''Relephon''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Relephon Moons]], of which several were populated.<ref name="TCSWE" />

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] Relephon's military forces under [[Ducha]] [[AlGray]] spearheaded a coup against [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo]].

{{Planet-stub}}
